top_tweets.text: google (and deepmind) would just win if they had a product leader with the balls to scorch earth the entire bureaucracy stack that is Google Product Management
top_tweets.author: jparkjmc
top_tweets.name: jpark
top_tweets.summary_zh: 認為 Google（與 DeepMind）若有產品領導者能大刀闊斧清理整個產品管理官僚體系，就能真正勝出。直指組織結構是 Google 產品力的核心瓶頸。

top_tweets.text: Reminder that we’ve spent basically all human capital and attention on AI the last two years and there still isn’t a single cool consumer product to come out of it.
top_tweets.author: staysaasy
top_tweets.name: staysaasy
top_tweets.summary_zh: 過去兩年人類資本與注意力幾乎全投入 AI，但至今仍沒有一個真正出色的消費者產品誕生。對 AI 產品化成果的批判性觀察。

top_tweets.text: This but it isnt even just a "ew AI slop, how dare you not hire artists" thing. Like yeah, the moral and ethical implications suck, but also if you arent willing to invest time and money into presenting your product, why should I even imagine it is worth my time or money?
top_tweets.author: Rec_A_Dork
top_tweets.name: Rec
top_tweets.summary_zh: 批評產品使用 AI 生成內容不只是道德問題，更是商業信號：若品牌不願投入時間與金錢於視覺呈現，憑什麼期待消費者投入時間與金錢購買產品？

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
